ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the zip code */,
  "modzcta" INTEGER /* Modified Zip Code Tabulation Area (MODZCTA) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the zip code */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the zip code in square miles */,
  "people_per_sqmi" REAL /* Population density (people per square mile) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution data */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Race distribution data */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Average income of the zip code */,
  "health_insurance_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of population with health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "cumulative_percentage_positive" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of positive cases */,
  "row_number" INTEGER /* Row number for ordering */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases in the last reporting period */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Percentage of patients who have recovered */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Percentage of patients who have died */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of patients hospitalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the test center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the test center */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code where the test center is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the test center */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the test center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tests the center can handle per day */,
  "test_types_supported" TEXT /* Types of tests supported by the center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the center's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_centers_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test center */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_result" INTEGER /* Result of the test (positive/negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "test_kit_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the test kit used */,
  "test_center_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific facility within the center where the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES test_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "preexisting_conditions" TEXT /* Preexisting medical conditions */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test conducted */,
  "last_test_result" INTEGER /* Result of the last test conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the geographic area */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  "centroid" TEXT /* Centroid of the zip code (coordinates) */,
  "boundary_polygon" TEXT /* Boundary polygon of the zip code */,
  "nearest_hospital" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest hospital */,
  "nearest_pharmacy" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest pharmacy */,
  "nearest_test_center" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest test center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Key findings of the report */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken based on the report */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, public user) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., hospital, clinic, community center) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code associated with the data source */,
  "data_source_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific facility within the data source */,
  "data_source_facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific facility within the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time of version approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality report */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Reference to the zip code */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-1) */,
  "issues_detected" TEXT /* Issues detected in the data */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific facility within the data source */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* Follow-up actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_source_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_facility_id") REFERENCES data_source_mapping ("data_source_facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
